steps.title: Find the true subject
steps.content: The subject is Barrada's pieces, which is plural. The phrase between the subject and the blank merely describes those pieces, so it does not change the verb number.

steps.title: Use plural verb agreement
steps.content: Choice B and Choice C are singular verb forms, so they do not agree with the plural subject. Choice D is a participle and cannot complete the main verb of the sentence. The plural present-tense verb fits the subject. The answer is A.
